mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO INVOICE_DETAIL (id, c_id,c_kind,c_name,b_createdDate,invoice_no,invoice_kind,INVOICE_TEXT,INVOICE_PRICE) VALUES (#{id}, #{c_id},#{c_kind},#{c_name},#{b_createdDate},#{invoice_no},#{invoice_kind},#{item.invoice_text}, #{item.invoice_price})
SELECT * FROM DUAL
mapper.select: select c_id,c_kind,c_name,c_tel,c_addr,c_info,c_boss from COMPANY WHERE c_kind like 'interior'
select c_id,c_kind,c_name,i_tag,i_text from INTERIOR where c_id like '%' || #{c_id} || '%' and c_kind like '%' || #{c_kind} || '%' and c_name like '%' || #{c_name} || '%'
select c_id,c_kind,c_name,ie_content,ie_tag,ie_tag2 from I_EXAMPLE where c_id like '%' || #{c_id} || '%' and c_kind like '%' || #{c_kind} || '%' and c_name like '%' || #{c_name} || '%'

select id,b_createddate,c_id,c_kind,c_name,b_kind,b_date,b_status,b_content,b_answer from Booking where c_id like '%' || #{c_id} || '%' and c_kind like '%' || #{c_kind} || '%' and c_name like '%' || #{c_name} || '%'

select id,b_createddate,c_id,c_kind,c_name,invoice_no,invoice_kind from INVOICE where id like '%' || #{id} || '%' and c_id like '%' || #{c_id} || '%' and c_kind like '%' || #{c_kind} || '%' and c_name like '%' || #{c_name} || '%' and b_createdDate = #{b_createdDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

select id,b_createddate,c_id,c_kind,c_name,invoice_no,invoice_kind,invoice_text,invoice_price from INVOICE_DETAIL where id like '%' || #{id} || '%' and c_id like '%' || #{c_id} || '%' and c_kind like '%' || #{c_kind} || '%' and c_name like '%' || #{c_name} || '%' and b_createdDate = #{b_createdDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} and invoice_no like '%' || #{invoice_no} || '%' and invoice_kind like '%' || #{invoice_kind} || '%'
